subject: [PATCH 3/4] mm: Fix demotion gfp by clearing GFP_RECLAIM after setting GFP_TRANSHUGE

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the complexity of GFP flag handling and suggested that it's difficult to reason about what the GFP flags actually are at any given point.
sentiment_signals: difficult to reason about GFP flags

2026-03-12.patch_summary: The patch aims to fix demotion GFP by clearing GFP_RECLAIM after setting GFP_TRANSHUGE.
